mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, c.cname AS company_name, d.name AS dept_name FROM tbl_privilege_role r LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_company c ON c.id = r.company_id LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_department d ON d.id = r.dept_id
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_privilege_role r LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_company c ON c.id = r.company_id LEFT JOIN tbl_privilege_department d ON d.id = r.dept_id
